{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032114190892094BBDE17370B6E322"}"},"total":2841},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7390405454929396505","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"完结撒花！！！追了几个月了，真的很喜欢男主的设定，很强但并不是每个领域都是强无敌，给了其他人一个展示的机会，很赞。作者也很给力，没有在最后来点刀子。最后的最后，我的番外嘞，速出速出，写点甜死我的最好了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1720715783,"group_id":"7352020954081397822","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N78ZRTJXmd2qSD24FjTVrCSOEt67pL8qW/s6XhgXJ7Xv","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776616050&x-signature=DrAQG0h3j%2BuZjDoa%2FpIJp7vPNFs%3D","user_id":"1689327950373812","user_name":"爱吃石鲮鱼的张蕴古"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1689327950373812","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7352020954081397822","book_info":{"abstract":"林轩重生了。
没系统，没作弊器，没有金手指。
但老天爷给了他一个变态的身体。
命运的齿轮也在这一刻开始转动。
……
木倾甜：姐夫，你有梦想吗？
林轩：有，我想装逼。
木倾甜：……
林轩：装逼是对尊严的渴望，是对现实的幻想，是对向往的权利，不装逼和咸鱼有什么区别……哎呀，媳妇儿你打我干嘛？
木倾颜：粗鄙。
林轩：对哈，身为读书人，这特喵叫人前显圣。
木倾颜：……

就这本书而言，爱情齁甜，但不腻。男主表现出的对梦想的追求，对责任的承担，对国家的忠诚，对生活的热爱……编不下去了。
反正，我很喜欢，期待下一本书，希望作者大大加油。归来仍是少年。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1722075857,"group_id":"7352020954081397822","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"长枪策马平天下， 巾帼自不让须眉","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8rFQogdZNz7N1WoDz0WhMfG6IAqKy07IYCzZfu61gza","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/93be4c712f2549b88fbf5789dfa30af1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776621562&x-signature=qgRuQKZnDOEMwVDLu7sbQvKfGi4%3D","user_id":"1328634315414327","user_name":"流风之回雪。 "},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1328634315414327","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7352020954081397822","book_info":{"abstract":"林轩重生了。
